Footer.tagline: Building excellence, one design at a time.

hero.title: Build Your Dream Home
hero.subtitle: Safe-Construct delivers world-class architectural designs and construction services tailored to your vision and budget.

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: Comprehensive construction and design services for every need
services.architecturalDesignDesc: Custom architectural plans tailored to your lifestyle and budget.
services.generalContractingDesc: End-to-end project management from foundation to finishing.
services.supervisionDesc: Expert on-site oversight to ensure quality and compliance.
services.costEstimationDesc: Accurate and transparent budget breakdowns before you commit.

catalogue.title: Featured Designs
catalogue.subtitle: Explore our most popular architectural plans

process.title: How It Works
process.step1_desc: We listen to your vision and create custom architectural plans tailored to your lifestyle.
process.step2_desc: Get a transparent, itemised cost breakdown before any commitment is made.
process.step3_desc: Our team oversees every phase of construction, ensuring quality at every step.
process.step4_desc: We hand over your completed project — on time, on budget, to specification.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by hundreds of homeowners across Africa
testimonials.quote1: Safe-Construct transformed our vision into reality. The architectural plans were exactly what we wanted, and the supervision ensured everything was built to perfection.
testimonials.quote2: From cost estimation to final handover, the team was professional and transparent every step of the way. Our duplex was completed on time and within budget.
testimonials.quote3: The 3D renders gave us a perfect preview of our future home. We made several adjustments before construction — saving us significant costs and regrets.
testimonials.quote4: Exceptional quality and attention to detail. The Safe-Construct team went above and beyond to ensure our commercial building met all regulatory requirements.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Dream?
cta.subtitle: Start with a free consultation and get a custom design proposal.

hero.title: Building the Future
hero.subtitle: We are a team of passionate architects and engineers dedicated to delivering premium, affordable construction solutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize access to world-class architectural design and construction excellence across Africa and beyond.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Professional construction and design services tailored to your needs
Services.heroSubtitle: From architectural design to full construction management — choose the service that fits where you are today.
Services.notSureTitle: Not sure which service you need?
Services.notSureSubtitle: Let's talk. Describe your project and we'll recommend the right path forward — no commitment required.

architectural-design.name: Architectural Design
architectural-design.summary: Custom architectural plans tailored to your lifestyle, budget and location. Floor plans, 3D renders, elevations and full documentation.
architectural-design.tagline: From your vision to a complete set of construction-ready drawings.

general-contracting.name: General Contracting
general-contracting.summary: We coordinate every trade, manage your timeline and budget, and build your project to the highest standard — start to finish.
general-contracting.tagline: End-to-end construction management from foundation to handover.

construction-supervision.name: Construction Supervision
construction-supervision.summary: Regular on-site inspections, photo-documented reports, and defect tracking — protecting your investment throughout the build.
construction-supervision.tagline: Independent quality assurance so your builder stays accountable.

cost-estimation.name: Cost Estimation
cost-estimation.summary: Detailed Bill of Quantities with current local market rates. Reduce guesswork and negotiate with confidence.
cost-estimation.tagline: Know the real cost before a single brick is laid.
